title: Display list text does not render on device (black screen)

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: During acceptance run, weather was not visible after tools demo; likely mode/channel state interaction. Retesting with explicit tool shutdown + channel reset + weather commands.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Running muted late-night retest: make display-list demo configurable and default text color to dark.sand5 for low brightness verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Retest attempt: display-list demo now uses font-id 6 (from live font registry) and forces channel index 3 before Draw/SendHttpItemList; reran with muted color dark.sand5 for on-device validation.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Root cause confirmed on-device: text display list must use type=22 with TextString. Updated demo_display_list defaults to item-type 22 and reran successfully (user saw HELLO).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Reopened: intermittent/blank still observed after prior close. Implementing reliability fix to match known-good payload (type=22, font=2, frame_by_frame base upload, no forced channel switch).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented SDK parity fix: DisplayItem now includes align (default 1) and send_display_list now sends align in ItemList payload, matching official SendHttpItemList examples. Unit test updated/passing.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Closing based on real-device acceptance in this session: user confirmed display-list text visible on device after payload parity fixes (type=22/TextString path with align support).
